Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.

tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Report of the borrower to'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.

tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Report of the borrower to
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Report of the borrower to'. tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Report of the borrower to
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Report of the borrower to'.
